findings.title: Invalid JSON breaks config parsing
findings.evidence: The added `more` entry opens a string after `: "true` but never closes it before the object terminator, so the post-image `config.json` is not valid JSON and any JSON parser will reject the file.
findings.suggested_comment: This makes `config.json` invalid JSON: the `more` value terminates around `\"malicious"`, then starts `"true` without a closing quote before the final `}`. Please escape or restructure this value so the config remains parseable.
findings.fix_hint: Validate the full post-image with a JSON parser; line 4 needs corrected escaping/quoting or the injected payload should be removed.
